name: Containment Breach: University
description:
Trapped in a zombified college campus, you must escape before you’re caught by the infected creatures roaming the grounds. Lecture halls sit abandoned, dorm lights flicker, and the once-busy quad is now eerily silent. As you navigate decaying classrooms, research labs, libraries, and residence halls, you must avoid being captured by infected students, faculty, and staff who relentlessly hunt anything still alive. Each infected has its own twisted method of tracking and capturing you, using the very spaces meant for learning against you. Time is running out—can you survive the night and make it off campus before you’re overwhelmed?

The twist? The infected are also after each other, and each one wants something.

Originally based off the game "Sayata's Bad Day", created by Jashinn.
creator: DeDerp
